behavior_summary: U8P_MAPTELE::hatch is a process that handles a U8P_MAPTELE::hatch/teleport trigger for an item/NPC: it reads the triggering entity's map and tile coordinates, matches them against hard-coded coordinate patterns and global progression flags, and — when a matching destination is chosen — sequences visual effects, fades, an optional avatar stasis, a teleport (Npc::teleport), and camera movement. After a successful teleport it sets a short-term guard flag (justTeleported) to prevent immediate retriggering.

Multiple map-specific branches exist; some branches set game-state flags (e.g., gotTheSymbols) or choose alternate destinations depending on progression flags (MalchirTest, goToInnerSanctum, arcadionMet, hydrosFree).

The routine spawns helper visual/timer processes and suspends for them to create timed effects around the teleport (spawn ->FIRESPEL::func1F65, spawn ->FREE::func1C19, process FadeToBlack / FadeFromBlack).
notable_control_flow: Top-level guard: read global flag justTeleported; if set the U8P_MAPTELE::hatch logic is bypassed (prevents immediate re-teleport).
Switch/branch on current map id (Npc::getMap) then nested pattern-matching on tile coordinates (Item::getX/Y/Z) to select a destination map (local6) and destination coordinates (local9/local10).
Several branches are gated by global progression flags (MalchirTest, goToInnerSanctum, gotTheSymbols, arcadionMet, hydrosFree) which alter or abort destination selection.

If a destination is chosen (local4 set true), the process: ensure NPC not busy, optionally set avatar stasis, spawn visual effects, Camera::setCenterOn / toggle status bits, start FadeToBlack, call Npc::teleport, set justTeleported, start FadeFromBlack, then Camera::move_to to destination and resume normal camera centering.
Some branches write gotTheSymbols or clear/set justTeleported differently for special-case behaviors.
open_questions: Exact mapping of the many hard-coded tile coordinate patterns to concrete in-game destination names and why specific patterns mark 'symbols' — inferred from code but not explicitly documented.
Precise spawn parameters and visual effect semantics for ->FIRESPEL::func1F65 and ->FREE::func1C19 (what visuals/timers they render and exact timing).
Whether any branches intentionally clear justTeleported (set to 0) as part of special flows, and the gameplay reasons for those exceptions.
Whether the process targets the player avatar exclusively or can teleport other NPC types in some contexts (inferred mostly for avatar).

main_function.name: U8P_MAPTELE::hatch
main_function.purpose: Detect when a U8P_MAPTELE::hatch/teleport trigger item or NPC is activated and, if permitted, teleport the avatar (or actor) to a destination computed from the current map and U8P_MAPTELE::hatch coordinates while running fade/visual sequencing and setting anti-retrigger guard flags.
entry_conditions: Invoked as a process (processType 0x0210) tied to a U8P_MAPTELE::hatch item/NPC.
Top-level guard: only proceeds if global flag justTeleported is not set (prevents immediate retrigger).
Implicit: the triggering entity (this) is present and its coordinates exist (Item::getX/Y/Z).

external_calls.purpose: Read the current map id of the triggering item/NPC to select which coordinate-branch to evaluate.
Get the triggering item's X tile coordinate for pattern matching and computing spawn/camera/destination X.
Get the triggering item's Y tile coordinate for pattern matching and computing spawn/camera/destination Y.
Get the triggering item's Z/floor value used by some pattern branches to choose destination or behavior.
Check that the triggering NPC/item is free; if busy, the process suspends/delays until it is ready to perform the teleport sequence.
Query whether the avatar is already in stasis to decide whether to call setAvatarInStasis before the sequence.
Place the avatar into stasis (prevent player actions) while running the teleport/fade/effect sequence.
Spawn a visual effect (inferred fire/spell) at computed world coordinates immediately before teleport to provide VFX feedback.
Spawn a small helper/timer process used to sequence delays/timing around the teleport/effects.
Toggle temporary status flags on an entity (used around visual/status sequencing before/after teleport).
Adjust camera centering behavior (temporarily disable or control centering) during the teleport transition.
Run a fade-to-black effect and wait for it before calling Npc::teleport to conceal the map change.
Perform the actual teleport of the avatar/NPC to the selected map and destination coordinates.
Run the fade-in effect after teleport and camera movement to reveal the destination.
Move or center the camera on the destination after teleport completes.

reads.name: justTeleported
reads.likely_effect: Short-term guard to prevent immediate re-triggering of U8P_MAPTELE::hatch teleport logic; read at entry to abort if set.

reads.name: MalchirTest
reads.likely_effect: Progression gate used to enable/disable a specific coordinate branch; affects whether that branch teleports or aborts.

reads.name: goToInnerSanctum
reads.likely_effect: When true, selects alternate destination coordinates for a particular tile-pattern branch (inferred alternate path).

reads.name: gotTheSymbols
reads.likely_effect: Checked to decide whether to perform or bypass a special-case branch; its presence gates symbol-related behavior.

reads.name: arcadionMet
reads.likely_effect: Gate for at least one branch that refuses to teleport until the player has met Arcadion (progression condition).

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Alters destination selection for certain maps based on world-state; switches branch outcomes.

writes.name: justTeleported
writes.likely_effect: Set after a successful teleport to prevent immediate retriggering. In some branches it may be cleared (set 0) to allow special-case flows.

writes.name: gotTheSymbols
writes.likely_effect: Set to indicate the player triggered/obtained symbols via a special coordinate branch; used for progression or gating.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_MAPTELE::hatch is a process that handles a U8P_MAPTELE::hatch/teleport trigger for an item/NPC: it reads the triggering entity's map and tile coordinates, matches them against hard-coded coordinate patterns and global progression flags, and — when a matching destination is chosen — sequences visual effects, fades, an optional avatar stasis, a teleport (Npc::teleport), and camera movement. After a successful teleport it sets a short-term guard flag (justTeleported) to prevent immediate retriggering.
